description_long: This hamburger features a glossy, golden-brown top bun adorned with a scattering of white sesame seeds. Beneath the bun, two thick beef patties are stacked, each separated by slices of melted yellow cheese that drape over the edges. Fresh green lettuce and vibrant red tomato slices are layered between the patties and cheese, adding color and texture. The bottom bun is slightly flatter and supports the weight of the stacked ingredients. The overall appearance is appetizing, with the ingredients neatly layered and visibly fresh. The hamburger is unwrapped and ready to eat, with no packaging present.
description: A double cheeseburger with sesame seed bun, stacked beef patties, cheese, lettuce, and tomato, all neatly layered and visually fresh.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full stack of two beef patties, cheese, lettuce, and tomato, with the sesame seed bun clearly visible.
description_view_1: This view highlights the right side, where the cheese slices and lettuce protrude slightly more, and the tomato slices are prominent.
description_view_2: The left side view reveals more of the lettuce and tomato, with the cheese edges less pronounced and the bun's roundness evident.
description_view_3: The rear view shows the back of the hamburger, with the lettuce and cheese peeking out and the sesame seed bun still visible.
attribute_topping_arrangement: Lettuce and tomato slices are layered between two beef patties and slices of cheese, with the cheese positioned directly above and below each patty. The toppings are evenly distributed and visible from all sides.
